title: Topstep vs TPT (2026): Same Lock Family, Opposite Trail Trajectory
description: Topstep vs Take Profit Trader — both lock funded drawdown at Starting Balance, both drop 50% consistency on the funded phase. But the trail mechanic moves in opposite directions across the lifecycle. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Topstep vs TPT (2026): Same Lock Family, Opposite Trail Trajectory
og.description: Both lock at Starting Balance. Both drop 50% consistency on funded. But Topstep starts intraday and goes EOD as you graduate, while TPT does EOD→intraday→EOD as you climb its phases. The shift is the story.
